headline: U.S. REIT Same-Store Net Operating Income Growth Holds Steady In Q1 2026
summary: US equity real estate investment trusts, excluding hotel-focused REITs, posted median YoY same-store net operating income growth of 2.6% in the first quarter. Read more here.

headline: Equinix Inc (EQIX) Added to Citi’s Focus List. Here’s What That Means
summary: Equinix Inc (NASDAQ:EQIX) is one of the best data center stocks to invest in according to billionaires. Equinix shares have gained more than 45% over the past six months, and analysts still see upside potential in the stock. On June 3, Equinix Inc (NASDAQ:EQIX) was added to Citi’s Focus List.
